author: fix-otel-propagation
content: Plan: Fix cross-process OTel context propagation across TaskManager → BrowserManager (via command queue) and TaskManager → StorageController (via DataSocket). 4 changes: (1) inject/extract span context through command_queue tuples, (2) inject/extract context through DataSocket data dicts, (3) move request_handler span from connection-level to per-record level, (4) remove soft-fail guards in test. Key files: browser_manager.py, storage_controller.py, test_otel.py
